sections.title: If the player has not completed all Achievement Diaries

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: Hey there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: My name is Twiggy O'Korn and I am the Mistress of all of the Achievement Diaries. It is a pleasure to make your acquaintance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Likewise.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a nice cape - please tell me about it.

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: Ah yes, this is a Cape of Accomplishment, available only to those who complete every single Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye!

sections.title: If the player has completed all Achievement Diaries

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: Hey there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I get a cape like yours?

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: I see you've completed all the Achievement Diaries - well done! However, the capes cost 99,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be back.

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: I see you've completed all the Achievement Diaries - well done! However, you'll need to free up some space to hold the cape and hood.

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: I see you've completed all the Achievement Diaries - well done! Now, I'll need 99,000 coins to cover my costs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are your costs?

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: Squirrel food, mostly. It's not like it grows on trees, you know! Anyway, do you want the cape?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here's 99,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, forget it.

sections.title: If the player has an achievement diary cape in their bank or inventory

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: Hey there!

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: I don't think you can afford one at the moment. They cost 99,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: It'll cost you another 99,000 coins. You do realise you already own a cape and hood, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want another set. Here's 99,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: You can, but you'll need to free up some space to hold the cape and hood.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the hood from my cape.

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: That's not a problem. I'll give you another one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: You don't appear to have enough space in your inventory, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: Hey there!

lines.speaker: Twiggy O'Korn
lines.text: Here, have some chocolate!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
